message:
refactor(fp-frame): replace implicit .into() with explicit Scalar::Int64() in test index labels

Replace ~300 occurrences of `i64.into()` with explicit `Scalar::Int64(i)`
constructors in test code for Series/DataFrame index labels. The implicit
From<i64> conversion obscured which Scalar variant was being constructed,
making test failures harder to diagnose. Explicit constructors make the
expected type immediately visible in assertion output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
